title: Railway RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Level CEN 07/2025 Exam City Details 2026
short_information: Indian Railway Railway Recruitment Board RRB Non Technical Popular Categories NTPC UnderGraduate Level Recruitment CEN 07/2025. Those candidates who are Enrolled in This Vacancy Can Exam City / Download Admit Card. Read the notification for RRB NTPC 10+2 Level Commercial Cum Ticker Clerk, Train Clerk, Accounts Clerk Cum Typist, Junior Clerk Cum Typist Post 2026 eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information. Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) RRB NTPC 10+2 Under Graduate Level Recruitment 2025 RRB NTPC UG Exam 2026 CEN 07/2025 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 500/- SC / ST / Female: 250/- PH (Divyang) : 250/- After Appear the Stage I Exam General / OBC / EWS : 400/- SC / ST / Female: 250/- PH (Divyang) : 250/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking RRB NTPC 10+2
eligibility: Read the Notification. RRB NTPC Under Graduate Level Post Wise

text_sections.section: How to Fill RRB NTPC 10+2 Recruitment Online Form 2025
text_sections.content: RRB NTPC 10+2 Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 28/10/2025 to 04/12/2025 | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in RRB NTPC 10+2 Recruitment 2025. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
